body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now has a translucent violet skin texture revealing faint internal energy currents, while the pointed ears appear as wispy, semi-transparent fringes. The flower-like structure on top transforms into a hollow, skeletal frame of deep violet energy with swirling crimson mist filling its center. The teal body now glows with a pale silver sheen, its leaf patterns replaced by faint, ghostly white ripples distorting the surface. The curled tail tip dissolves into a tattered, shadowy vapor trail that drifts like mist.
signature_feature: Flower structure: hollow violet skeletal frame with swirling crimson mist inside.
